Spiritual rebirth causes one to lose the desire for sin (he "continueth not in sin," as the Joseph Smith Translation says). That is the powerful message of Mosiah 5:2: "The Spirit of the Lord Omnipotent. . . has wrought a mighty change in us, or in our hearts, that we have no more disposition to do evil, but to do good continually."
